title: settings.update
description: Write a single settings key. Implements the no-op guard and emits a non-noisy audit event when value changes.

key.description: Name of a v1 settings key.

value.description: Value to write. Must validate against the per-key sub-schema in settings.state.v1.json.

status.description: 'success' when the value changed and was persisted. 'noop' when the incoming value is deep-equal to the stored value (A4, R4.1): no row write, no audit event. Matches spec 002 noop pattern.

prior_value.description: Value before the update. Equal to new_value when status='noop'.

new_value.description: Value after the update. Equal to prior_value when status='noop'.

audit_id.description: Audit event id for non-noisy changes. Absent for noisy keys and when status='noop'.

errors.message: The supplied settings key is not part of the v1 schema.
The supplied value does not validate against the key's schema.
